questions.question: Explain any five real-world applications of machine learning across different industries.
keyPoints: Healthcare: disease diagnosis from medical images

questions.question: How is machine learning used in healthcare? Give at least three applications.
keyPoints: Disease diagnosis using CNNs on medical images
Personalized medicine: treatments based on patient data

questions.question: Match the following ML techniques to their best-suited applications: (a) CNN, (b) K-Means, (c) Reinforcement Learning, (d) Naive Bayes.
keyPoints: CNN → Image classification (facial recognition, medical imaging)

questions.question: Discuss the applications of ML in Natural Language Processing with examples.
Explain how ML is used in the finance industry for fraud detection and credit scoring.
keyPoints: Fraud detection: anomaly detection on transaction patterns
Credit scoring: logistic regression/trees on applicant features
